wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Prismatic Gem|2}}{{R|Prismatic Gem||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. After you obtain this Relic, your card rewards will show cards from other colors excluding {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless Cards|2}}. Additionally, you gain {{Icon|CE|2}} at the start of each turn.

==Sources==
After fighting a {{2|Bosses|Boss}} in {{2|Acts|Act 1}}, it can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Prismatic Gem''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Electric Shrymp||2}}, {{R|Glass Eye||2}}, {{R|Sand Castle||2}}, and {{R|Sea Glass||2}}, only 1 of the 5 can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
**'''Prismatic Gem''' is the least likely of these {{2|Relics}} to appear, with an ~8% chance of doing so.

==Notes==
When playing as any character except the {{2|Defect}}, you gain 1 {{2|Orbs#Orb_Slot|Orb Slot}} when you first play an {{2|Orbs|Orb}} card during combat

==Interactions==
Sources of cards that are not card rewards, such as {{C|White Noise||2}} or potions which offer a choice of cards when used, will still only grant cards from your current character.
<!-- Potential testing: What other events involve card rewards, and are they consistently affected by Prismatic Gem? -->
===Neutral===
*If the player encounters the {{E|Colorful Philosophers|2}} {{2|Event}}, and has '''Prismatic Gem''', then regardless of which character's card pool is chosen, the resulting card rewards will include cards from ''all'' the characters, including the current character.
**If the player also has {{R|Dingy Rug||2}}, and Dingy Rug was picked up ''before'' Prismatic Gem, the resulting card rewards will include {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless}} cards in addition to cards of the chosen card pool- but not cards from additional characters.
**If the player also has {{R|Dingy Rug||2}}, but Dingy Rug was picked up ''after'' Prismatic Gem, the resulting card rewards will include cards from ''all'' the characters, including the current character, but ''not'' include {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless}} cards.
<!-- ^ This binary may apply to all events involving card rewards. -->
*'''Prismatic Gem''' does not affect cards presented by [[Slay_the_Spire_2:The_Merchant|The Merchant]].
**However if the Store {{2|Relic}} {{R|Orrery||2}} is purchased, the resulting card rewards ''will'' be affected by '''Prismatic Gem'''.
====Relics====
{{R|Dingy Rug||2}}: Colorless Cards also appear in card rewards

== Trivia ==
* The effect of this relic is similar to {{R|Prismatic Shard}} from the first Slay the Spire, however {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless Cards|2}} will not appear and an extra {{KW|Energy||2}} is given at the start of your turn.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Prismatic Gem to the game.
